/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -O3 -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libtf_grouping.so -o libtf_grouping.so CMakeFiles/tf_grouping.dir/tf_grouping.cu.o CMakeFiles/tf_grouping.dir/tf_grouping.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tf_grouping.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/home/yhlever/anaconda3/envs/AMSMC/lib/python3.8/site-packages/tensorflow  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yhlever/anaconda3/envs/AMSMC/lib/python3.8/site-packages/tensorflow:/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs:/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lcudart -ltensorflow_framework -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
